nasb.text: So the angel who was speaking with me said to me, “Proclaim, saying, ‘Thus says the Lord of hosts, “I am exceedingly jealous for Jerusalem and Zion.

esv.text: So the angel who talked with me said to me, ‘Cry out, Thus says the Lord of hosts: I am exceedingly jealous for Jerusalem and for Zion.

cnv.text: 那與我說話的天使對我說：“你要宣告：‘萬軍之耶和華這樣說：我為耶路撒冷和錫安心裡充滿嫉恨。

ccb.text: 那位天使对我说：“你要宣告，万军之耶和华说，‘我对耶路撒冷，对锡安充满了火热的爱。
